name: IdsEdwBnfSumTxDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH DataSource AS (SELECT B.BNF_SUM_TX_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, B.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, B.BNF_SUM_ID, B.SEQ_NO, B.BNF_SUM_SK, B.TX_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BNF_SUM_TX B LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON B.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE B.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}), xfm_BusinessLogic AS (SELECT DataSource.BNF_SUM_TX_SK AS BNF_SUM_TX_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(DataSource.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE DataSource.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, DataSource.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID AS PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, DataSource.BNF_SUM_ID AS BNF_SUM_ID, DataSource.SEQ_NO AS BNF_SUM_TX_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DataSource.BNF_SUM_SK AS BNF_SUM_SK, DataSource.TX_DESC AS BNF_SUM_TX_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM DataSource) SELECT * FROM xfm_BusinessLogic

Annotations:
Add Defaults and Null Handling
This is Source extract data from an IDS table and apply Code denormalization, create a load ready file.

Job Name:
IdsEdwBnfSumTxExtr

Table:
BNF_SUM_TX_D
Read from source table BNF_SUM_TX from IDS Table;
Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure

Write BNF_SUM_TX_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Job.
